13 Slides
The Full Deck
Scroll to read  ·  Click any slide to enlarge
Slide 01 / 13 Askloud
Conversational search for multi-cloud inventory. Plain English in. Formatted tables out. Zero data exfiltration.
Slide 02 / 13 The Fragmented Visibility Problem
Modern infrastructure spans AWS, GCP, and Azure — but each provider demands its own CLI, its own data model, and complex query syntax.
Slide 03 / 13 One Interface. Any Cloud. Plain English.
Ask in English, get a unified table. No CLI context switching. No query language required.
Slide 04 / 13 Translating Intent, Not Processing Data
The LLM acts purely as a translation engine — parsing natural language into a JMESPath query plan executed locally by Python.
Slide 05 / 13 Privacy by Design: Zero Data Exfiltration
Askloud uses AI as a syntax translator, not a data processor. Your actual infrastructure inventory never leaves your machine.
Slide 06 / 13 Choose Your Operating Mode
Toggle between Direct Search (offline, $0), Snapshot NL (local JSON), and Live Mode (real-time CLI execution).
Slide 07 / 13 Live Mode: Real-Time Execution
The engine translates your question into executable CLI commands, runs them locally, and formats the output transparently.
Slide 08 / 13 Direct Search: Blazing Fast, Zero Cost
Single-token inputs bypass the LLM entirely, scanning all records in memory across AWS, GCP, and Azure instantly.
Slide 09 / 13 Native Shell Integration
Pipe output through grep, awk, wc using | cmd. Prefix ! to run raw shell commands within the Askloud prompt.
Slide 10 / 13 The Multi-Cloud Rosetta Stone
Askloud normalizes disparate data models. Ask about a resource without knowing which cloud it lives in.
Slide 11 / 13 Columns Without Code Changes
Adding or removing fields is a simple .conf file edit. No code changes, no redeployment, no pull requests required.
Slide 12 / 13 Aggressive Token Optimization
Every design decision reduces token spend. Direct Search = $0. No RAG, no chat history, minimal input to the API.
Slide 13 / 13 Ready to Query?
Docker image ships with all cloud CLIs pre-installed. Credentials safely mounted read-only. Run your first query today.
Why Askloud
Built different.
Privacy First

Zero Data Exfiltration

Your actual infrastructure inventory never leaves your machine. Only the plain English question and schema go to the Anthropic API.

Translation Engine

LLM as Syntax Translator

The LLM parses natural language into a structured JMESPath query plan, executed locally by the Python engine.

Multi-Cloud

Rosetta Stone for Cloud

Normalizes disparate data models across AWS, GCP, and Azure. Ask about a resource without knowing which cloud it lives in.

Cost Optimized

Aggressive Token Savings

Direct Search bypasses the LLM entirely at $0. No RAG, no chat history. Anthropic Prompt Caching reuses system context.

Shell Native

Unix Pipeline Compatible

Pipe output through grep, awk, wc using | cmd. Prefix ! to run raw shell commands within the Askloud prompt.

No-Code Config

Columns Without PRs

Adding or removing output fields is a simple .conf file edit. Field names resolve automatically — no redeployment needed.
